title: springy algerian lamb kebabs
description: a funky spring dish featuring lamb loin chops, deglazed with a hint of cumin and coriander, served with a side of naan bread. enjoy the monsoon season with this simple yet flavorful recipe.
instructions: in a blender or food processor, combine cumin seeds, coriander powder, garam masala, salt, and black pepper. blend until the spices are well combined.
heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. add the spice blend and saut9e for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the lamb loin chops to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until browned.
transfer the lamb chops to a plate and set aside.
in the same skillet, combine the yogurt, lemon juice, and honey (if using). bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
add the lamb chops back to the skillet and coat them with the yogurt sauce.
serving suggestion: serve the lamb chops with a side of naan bread, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
